payload.reason: WriteOpsAndAutoCommit now tracks staged[] separately from written[]; rollback unstages only paths that successfully passed StageOpFile. runUnstageFn split into a swappable var so tests can record calls. Two regression tests: (1) commit-failure rollback unstages exactly the staged paths and removes files; (2) ProbeAndWrite-failure on op 2 of 2 (triggered via shard-collision) results in zero unstage calls — pre-fix this would call unstage on op 1's never-staged path.
